step_by_step_thinking: I concur with the consensus on answering D. One additional point to support this is that patients experiencing Class 3 hemorrhagic shock often require immediate surgical intervention along with aggressive fluid resuscitation strategies because they have already reached a state where non-surgical measures may no longer suffice given the extent of blood volume deficit. Answer Choice: D.
